---
title: "SoCo Homebrew All-Grain Recipe Scraper"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(rvest)
dir.create("recipe-pdfs", showWarnings = FALSE)
```

## Step 1: Collect recipe page URLs from all 15 listing pages

```{r}
#| label: collect-urls

get_recipe_urls <- function(page_num) {
  url <- paste0(
    "https://socohomebrew.com/homebrew-recipe-kits/all-grain-recipe-kits/?page=",
    page_num
  )
  page <- read_html(url)
  page |>
    html_elements(".productGrid .product h4 a") |>
    html_attr("href")
}

recipe_urls <- lapply(1:15, get_recipe_urls) |> unlist()

cat("Total recipe pages found:", length(recipe_urls), "\n")
```

## Step 2: For each recipe page, find and download the PDF

```{r}
#| label: download-pdfs

get_pdf_url <- function(recipe_url) {
  page <- read_html(recipe_url)
  page |>
    html_elements("a") |>
    (\(links) {
      hrefs <- html_attr(links, "href")
      hrefs[grepl("\\.pdf$", hrefs, ignore.case = TRUE)]
    })() |>
    head(1)
}

download_recipe_pdf <- function(recipe_url) {
  pdf_url <- tryCatch(get_pdf_url(recipe_url), error = \(e) character(0))

  if (length(pdf_url) == 0 || is.na(pdf_url)) {
    message("No PDF found for: ", recipe_url)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  filename <- utils::URLdecode(basename(pdf_url))
  dest_path <- file.path("recipe-pdfs", filename)

  if (file.exists(dest_path)) {
    message("Already downloaded: ", filename)
    return(invisible(dest_path))
  }

  tryCatch(
    {
      download.file(pdf_url, dest_path, mode = "wb", quiet = TRUE)
      message("Downloaded: ", filename)
    },
    error = \(e) message("Failed to download ", pdf_url, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
  )

  Sys.sleep(2)
  invisible(dest_path)
}

# Download all PDFs with a 2-second pause between each
for (url in recipe_urls) {
  download_recipe_pdf(url)
}
```

## Results

```{r}
#| label: results

pdfs <- list.files("recipe-pdfs", pattern = "\\.pdf$", ignore.case = TRUE)
cat("PDFs downloaded:", length(pdfs), "\n")
```
